# 

# `baseballr`

`baseballr` is a package written for R focused on baseball analysis. It
includes functions for acquiring data from a range of sources — the [MLB
Stats API](https://statsapi.mlb.com/), [ESPN](https://www.espn.com/)
(MLB and NCAA college baseball), [Fox
Sports](https://www.foxsports.com/),
[FanGraphs.com](https://www.fangraphs.com/),
[Baseball-Reference.com](https://www.baseball-reference.com/),
[baseballsavant.mlb.com](https://baseballsavant.mlb.com/), the [NCAA
stats site](https://stats.ncaa.org/), Spotrac, the Chadwick Bureau
register, and Retrosheet. It also includes functions for calculating
metrics, such as wOBA, FIP, and team-level consistency over custom time
frames.

You can read more about some of the functions and how to use them at its
[official site](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/) as well as this
[Hardball Times
article](https://tht.fangraphs.com/developing-the-baseballr-package-for-r/).

## Installation

You can install the CRAN version of
[**`baseballr`**](https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=baseballr) with:

``` r

install.packages("baseballr")
```

You can install the released version of
[**`baseballr`**](https://github.com/BillPetti/baseballr) from
[GitHub](https://github.com/BillPetti/baseballr) with:

``` r

# You can install using the pak package using the following code:
if (!requireNamespace('pak', quietly = TRUE)){
  install.packages('pak')
}
pak::pak("BillPetti/baseballr")
```

``` r

# Alternatively, using the devtools package:
if (!requireNamespace('devtools', quietly = TRUE)){
  install.packages('devtools')
}
devtools::install_github(repo = "BillPetti/baseballr")
```

For experimental functions in development, you can install the
[development
branch](https://github.com/BillPetti/baseballr/tree/development_branch):

``` r

# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("BillPetti/baseballr", ref = "development_branch")
```

## **Functionality**

The package consists of two main sets of functions: data acquisition and
metric calculation.

For example, if you want to see the standings for a specific MLB
division on a given date, you can use the
[`bref_standings_on_date()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/bref_standings_on_date.md)
function. Just pass the year, month, day, and division you want:

``` r

library(baseballr)
library(dplyr)
bref_standings_on_date("2015-08-01", "NL East", from = FALSE)
```

``` R
## ── MLB Standings on Date data from baseball-reference.com ─── baseballr 2.0.0 ──

## ℹ Data updated: 2026-06-12 07:31:45 EDT

## # A tibble: 5 × 8
##   Tm        W     L `W-L%` GB       RS    RA `pythW-L%`
##   <chr> <int> <int>  <dbl> <chr> <int> <int>      <dbl>
## 1 WSN      54    48  0.529 --      422   391      0.535
## 2 NYM      54    50  0.519 1.0     368   373      0.494
## 3 ATL      46    58  0.442 9.0     379   449      0.423
## 4 MIA      42    62  0.404 13.0    370   408      0.455
## 5 PHI      41    64  0.39  14.5    386   511      0.374
```

Right now the function works as far as back as 1994, which is when both
leagues split into three divisions.

You can also pull data for all hitters over a specific date range. Here
are the results for all hitters from August 1st through October 3rd
during the 2015 season:

``` r

data <- bref_daily_batter("2015-08-01", "2015-10-03") 
data %>%
  dplyr::glimpse()
```

``` R
## Rows: 764
## Columns: 30
## $ bbref_id <chr> "machama01", "duffyma01", "altuvjo01", "eatonad02", "choosh01…
## $ season   <int> 2015, 2015, 2015, 2015, 2015, 2015, 2015, 2015, 2015, 2015, 2…
## $ Name     <chr> "Manny Machado", "Matt Duffy", "Jose Altuve", "Adam Eaton", "…
## $ Age      <dbl> 22, 24, 25, 26, 32, 21, 27, 28, 36, 28, 29, 29, 27, 29, 27, 2…
## $ Level    <chr> "Maj-AL", "Maj-NL", "Maj-AL", "Maj-AL", "Maj-AL", "Maj-AL", "…
## $ Team     <chr> "Baltimore", "San Francisco", "Houston", "Chicago", "Texas", …
## $ G        <dbl> 59, 59, 57, 58, 58, 58, 59, 58, 59, 57, 55, 57, 57, 58, 56, 5…
## $ PA       <dbl> 266, 264, 262, 262, 260, 259, 259, 258, 257, 257, 255, 255, 2…
## $ AB       <dbl> 237, 248, 244, 230, 211, 224, 239, 235, 231, 233, 213, 218, 2…
## $ R        <dbl> 36, 33, 30, 37, 48, 35, 32, 29, 37, 27, 50, 37, 36, 25, 38, 4…
## $ H        <dbl> 66, 71, 81, 74, 71, 79, 54, 66, 75, 48, 65, 56, 61, 51, 78, 5…
## $ X1B      <dbl> 43, 54, 53, 56, 47, 51, 34, 37, 48, 30, 34, 32, 35, 33, 66, 2…
## $ X2B      <dbl> 10, 12, 19, 12, 14, 17, 6, 17, 16, 11, 13, 13, 15, 10, 7, 13,…
## $ X3B      <dbl> 0, 2, 3, 1, 1, 4, 1, 0, 2, 1, 2, 4, 0, 1, 3, 0, 4, 0, 1, 1, 0…
## $ HR       <dbl> 13, 3, 6, 5, 9, 7, 13, 12, 9, 6, 16, 7, 11, 7, 2, 20, 9, 8, 8…
## $ RBI      <dbl> 32, 30, 18, 31, 34, 32, 27, 40, 53, 21, 50, 19, 31, 39, 23, 4…
## $ BB       <dbl> 26, 15, 10, 23, 39, 18, 16, 17, 21, 21, 34, 33, 21, 39, 12, 3…
## $ IBB      <dbl> 1, 0, 1, 1, 1, 0, 0, 6, 1, 1, 0, 1, 1, 5, 0, 4, 3, 3, 7, 2, 2…
## $ uBB      <dbl> 25, 15, 9, 22, 38, 18, 16, 11, 20, 20, 34, 32, 20, 34, 12, 35…
## $ SO       <dbl> 42, 35, 28, 55, 51, 38, 68, 56, 29, 53, 46, 62, 41, 48, 27, 7…
## $ HBP      <dbl> 2, 0, 4, 5, 8, 1, 3, 5, 1, 1, 2, 3, 3, 1, 1, 6, 1, 3, 4, 1, 0…
## $ SH       <dbl> 0, 0, 1, 2, 1, 11, 0, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0, 0, 2, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, …
## $ SF       <dbl> 1, 1, 3, 2, 1, 5, 1, 1, 4, 2, 5, 1, 2, 2, 3, 0, 3, 2, 3, 4, 3…
## $ GDP      <dbl> 5, 9, 6, 1, 1, 4, 2, 2, 9, 7, 5, 1, 4, 8, 1, 2, 3, 10, 5, 4, …
## $ SB       <dbl> 6, 8, 11, 9, 2, 10, 0, 0, 0, 3, 3, 4, 5, 4, 24, 2, 1, 0, 6, 0…
## $ CS       <dbl> 4, 0, 4, 4, 0, 2, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0, 1, 3, 2, 7, 2, 3, 0, 2, 0, 0…
## $ BA       <dbl> 0.278, 0.286, 0.332, 0.322, 0.336, 0.353, 0.226, 0.281, 0.325…
## $ OBP      <dbl> 0.353, 0.326, 0.364, 0.392, 0.456, 0.395, 0.282, 0.341, 0.377…
## $ SLG      <dbl> 0.485, 0.387, 0.508, 0.448, 0.540, 0.558, 0.423, 0.506, 0.528…
## $ OPS      <dbl> 0.839, 0.713, 0.872, 0.840, 0.996, 0.953, 0.704, 0.847, 0.906…
```

In terms of metric calculation, the package allows the user to calculate
the consistency of team scoring and run prevention for any year using
[`team_consistency()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/team_consistency.md):

``` r

team_consistency(2015)
```

``` R
## # A tibble: 30 × 5
##    Team  Con_R Con_RA Con_R_Ptile Con_RA_Ptile
##    <chr> <dbl>  <dbl>       <dbl>        <dbl>
##  1 ARI    0.37   0.36          17           15
##  2 ATL    0.41   0.4           88           63
##  3 BAL    0.4    0.38          70           42
##  4 BOS    0.39   0.4           52           63
##  5 CHC    0.38   0.41          30           85
##  6 CHW    0.39   0.4           52           63
##  7 CIN    0.41   0.36          88           15
##  8 CLE    0.41   0.4           88           63
##  9 COL    0.35   0.34           7            3
## 10 DET    0.39   0.38          52           42
## # ℹ 20 more rows
```

You can also calculate wOBA per plate appearance and wOBA on contact for
any set of data over any date range, provided you have the data
available.

Simply pass the proper data frame to `woba_plus`:

``` r

data %>%
  dplyr::filter(PA > 200) %>%
  woba_plus %>%
  dplyr::arrange(desc(wOBA)) %>%
  dplyr::select(Name, Team, season, PA, wOBA, wOBA_CON) %>%
  dplyr::glimpse()
```

``` R
## Rows: 117
## Columns: 6
## $ Name     <chr> "Edwin Encarnación", "Bryce Harper", "David Ortiz", "Joey Vot…
## $ Team     <chr> "Toronto", "Washington", "Boston", "Cincinnati", "Baltimore",…
## $ season   <int> 2015, 2015, 2015, 2015, 2015, 2015, 2015, 2015, 2015, 2015, 2…
## $ PA       <dbl> 216, 248, 213, 251, 253, 260, 245, 255, 223, 241, 223, 259, 2…
## $ wOBA     <dbl> 0.490, 0.450, 0.449, 0.445, 0.434, 0.430, 0.430, 0.422, 0.410…
## $ wOBA_CON <dbl> 0.555, 0.529, 0.541, 0.543, 0.617, 0.495, 0.481, 0.494, 0.459…
```

You can also generate these wOBA-based stats, as well as FIP, for
pitchers using the
[`fip_plus()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/fip_plus.md)
function:

``` r

bref_daily_pitcher("2015-04-05", "2015-04-30") %>% 
  fip_plus() %>% 
  dplyr::select(season, Name, IP, ERA, SO, uBB, HBP, HR, FIP, wOBA_against, wOBA_CON_against) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(IP)) %>% 
  head(10)
```

``` R
## ── MLB Daily Pitcher data from baseball-reference.com ─────── baseballr 2.0.0 ──

## ℹ Data updated: 2026-06-12 07:34:40 EDT

## # A tibble: 10 × 11
##    season Name               IP   ERA    SO   uBB   HBP    HR   FIP wOBA_against
##     <int> <chr>           <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <dbl>        <dbl>
##  1   2015 Johnny Cueto     37    1.95    38     4     2     3  2.62        0.21 
##  2   2015 Dallas Keuchel   37    0.73    22    11     0     0  2.84        0.169
##  3   2015 Sonny Gray       36.1  1.98    25     6     1     1  2.69        0.218
##  4   2015 Mike Leake       35.2  3.03    25     7     0     5  4.16        0.24 
##  5   2015 Félix Hernández  34.2  1.82    36     6     3     1  2.2         0.225
##  6   2015 Corey Kluber     34    4.24    36     5     2     2  2.4         0.295
##  7   2015 Jake Odorizzi    33.2  2.41    26     8     1     0  2.38        0.213
##  8   2015 Josh Collmenter  32.2  2.76    16     3     0     1  2.82        0.29 
##  9   2015 Bartolo Colón    32.2  3.31    25     1     0     4  3.29        0.28 
## 10   2015 Zack Greinke     32.2  1.93    27     7     1     2  3.01        0.24 
## # ℹ 1 more variable: wOBA_CON_against <dbl>
```

## **Issues**

Please leave any suggestions or bugs in the [Issues
section](https://github.com/billpetti/baseballr/issues).

## **Pull Requests**

Pull request are welcome, but I cannot guarantee that they will be
accepted or accepted quickly. Please make all pull requests to the
[development
branch](https://github.com/billpetti/baseballr/tree/development_branch)
for review.

## **Breaking Changes**

[**Full News on
Releases**](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/news/index.html)

## **Citations**

To cite the [**`baseballr`**](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/) R
package in publications, use:

BibTex Citation

``` bibtex
@misc{petti_gilani_2021,
  author = {Bill Petti and Saiem Gilani},
  title = {baseballr: The SportsDataverse's R Package for Baseball Data.},
  url = {https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/},
  year = {2021}
}
```

# Package index

## Fox Sports (Bifrost)

Read-only Fox Sports (Bifrost) MLB wrappers (roster, team stats, game
log, standings, leaders, odds)

### Fox Sports MLB Data Functions

Read-only Fox Sports (Bifrost) MLB wrappers (roster, team stats, game
log, standings, leaders, odds)

- [`fox_mlb_league_leaders()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/fox_mlb_league_leaders.md)
  :

  **Get Fox Sports MLB statistical leaders**

- [`fox_mlb_odds()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/fox_mlb_odds.md)
  :

  **Get Fox Sports MLB game odds**

- [`fox_mlb_standings()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/fox_mlb_standings.md)
  :

  **Get Fox Sports MLB standings**

- [`fox_mlb_team_gamelog()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/fox_mlb_team_gamelog.md)
  :

  **Get Fox Sports MLB team game log**

- [`fox_mlb_team_roster()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/fox_mlb_team_roster.md)
  :

  **Get Fox Sports MLB team roster**

- [`fox_mlb_team_stats()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/fox_mlb_team_stats.md)
  :

  **Get Fox Sports MLB team stat leaders**

## Baseball Savant (Statcast)

Functions exported by baseballr to access Baseball Savant (Statcast) MLB
Data

### Baseball Savant / Statcast Data Functions

Functions exported by baseballr to access Baseball Savant (Statcast) MLB
Data

- [`statcast`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/statcast.md)
  :

  **Statcast Functions Overview**

- [`statcast_impute`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/statcast_impute.md)
  :

  **Statcast Label Imputation**

- [`statcast_leaderboards()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/statcast_leaderboards.md)
  :

  **Query Baseball Savant Leaderboards**

- [`statcast_search()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/statcast_search.md)
  [`statcast_search.default()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/statcast_search.md)
  [`statcast_search_batters()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/statcast_search.md)
  [`statcast_search_pitchers()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/statcast_search.md)
  :

  **Query Statcast by Date Range and Players**

## Baseball Savant Helpers

Functions exported by baseballr to process Baseball Savant MLB Data

### Baseball Savant MLB Helper Functions

Functions exported by baseballr to process Baseball Savant MLB Data

- [`edge_code()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/edge_code.md)
  :

  **Edge Code**

- [`edge_frequency()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/edge_frequency.md)
  :

  **Edge Percentage Frequency**

- [`code_barrel()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/code_barrel.md)
  :

  **Helper for determining whether a batted ball is a "barrel"**

- [`process_statcast_payload()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/process_statcast_payload.md)
  :

  **Process Baseball Savant CSV payload**

- [`statline_from_statcast()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/statline_from_statcast.md)
  :

  **Create stat lines from Statcast data**

- [`label_statcast_imputed_data()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/label_statcast_imputed_data.md)
  :

  **Label Statcast data as imputed**

- [`linear_weights_savant()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/linear_weights_savant.md)
  :

  **Generate linear weight values for events using Baseball Savant
  data**

## baseballr Data Repository

Functions exported by baseballr to access data hosted in the baseballr
data repository

### baseballr Data Repository Loader Functions

Functions exported by baseballr to access data hosted in the baseballr
data repository

- [`load_baseball`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/load_baseball.md)
  [`load_data`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/load_baseball.md)
  [`baseballr_data`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/load_baseball.md)
  :

  **baseballr Data Loader Overview**

- [`load_game_info_sup()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/load_game_info_sup.md)
  :

  **Download a data frame of supplemental data about MLB games since
  2008.**

- [`load_ncaa_baseball_pbp()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/load_ncaa_baseball_pbp.md)
  :

  **Load cleaned NCAA baseball play-by-play data from the baseballr data
  repo**

- [`load_ncaa_baseball_schedule()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/load_ncaa_baseball_schedule.md)
  :

  **Load cleaned NCAA baseball schedule from the baseballr data repo**

- [`load_ncaa_baseball_season_ids()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/load_ncaa_baseball_season_ids.md)
  :

  **Load cleaned NCAA men's college baseball season IDs from the
  baseballr data repo**

- [`load_ncaa_baseball_teams()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/load_ncaa_baseball_teams.md)
  :

  **Load cleaned NCAA men's college baseball teams from the baseballr
  data repo**

- [`load_umpire_ids()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/load_umpire_ids.md)
  :

  **Download a data frame of all umpires and their mlbamids for games
  since 2008**

## NCAA Baseball

Functions exported by baseballr to access NCAA Baseball Data

### NCAA Baseball Data Functions

Functions exported by baseballr to access NCAA Baseball Data

- [`ncaa`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/ncaa.md) :

  **NCAA Functions Overview**

- [`get_ncaa_baseball_pbp()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/get_ncaa_baseball_pbp.md)
  [`ncaa_baseball_pbp()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/get_ncaa_baseball_pbp.md)
  :

  **(legacy) Get Play-By-Play Data for NCAA Baseball Games**

- [`ncaa_baseball_roster()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/get_ncaa_baseball_roster.md)
  [`get_ncaa_baseball_roster()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/get_ncaa_baseball_roster.md)
  :

  **(legacy) Get NCAA Baseball Rosters**

- [`ncaa_game_logs()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/ncaa_game_logs.md)
  :

  **Get NCAA Baseball Game Logs**

- [`ncaa_lineups()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/ncaa_lineups.md)
  :

  **Retrieve lineups for a given NCAA game via its `game_info_url`**

- [`ncaa_park_factor()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/ncaa_park_factor.md)
  :

  **Get Park Effects for NCAA Baseball Teams**

- [`ncaa_pbp()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/ncaa_pbp.md)
  :

  **Get Play-By-Play Data for NCAA Baseball Games**

- [`ncaa_roster()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/ncaa_roster.md)
  :

  **Get NCAA Baseball Rosters**

- [`ncaa_schedule_info()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/ncaa_schedule_info.md)
  :

  **Get Schedule and Results for NCAA Baseball Teams**

- [`ncaa_school_id_lu()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/ncaa_school_id_lu.md)
  :

  **Lookup NCAA baseball school IDs (Division I, II, and III)**

- [`ncaa_scrape()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/ncaa_scrape.md)
  :

  **(legacy) Scrape NCAA baseball Team Player Stats (Division I, II, and
  III)**

- [`ncaa_team_player_stats()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/ncaa_team_player_stats.md)
  :

  **Scrape NCAA baseball Team Player Stats (Division I, II, and III)**

- [`ncaa_teams()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/ncaa_teams.md)
  :

  **Scrape NCAA baseball Teams (Division I, II, and III)**

## Retrosheet

Functions exported by baseballr to access Retrosheet Data

### Retrosheet Data Functions

Functions exported by baseballr to access Retrosheet Data

- [`retrosheet_data()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/retrosheet_data.md)
  :

  **Get, Parse, and Format Retrosheet Event and Roster Files**

## FanGraphs

Functions exported by baseballr to access FanGraphs’ MLB and MiLB Data

### FanGraphs MLB and MiLB Data Functions

Functions exported by baseballr to access FanGraphs’ MLB and MiLB Data

- [`fangraphs`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/fangraphs.md)
  :

  **FanGraphs Functions Overview**

- [`fg_bat_leaders()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/fg_bat_leaders.md)
  :

  **(legacy) Scrape Batter Leaderboards from FanGraphs**

- [`fg_batter_game_logs()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/fg_batter_game_logs.md)
  :

  **Scrape Batter Game Logs from FanGraphs**

- [`fg_batter_leaders()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/fg_batter_leaders.md)
  :

  **Scrape Batter Leaderboards from FanGraphs**

- [`fg_fielder_leaders()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/fg_fielder_leaders.md)
  :

  **Scrape Fielder Leaderboards from FanGraphs**

- [`fg_guts()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/fg_guts.md)
  :

  **Scrape FanGraphs.com Guts!**

- [`fg_milb_batter_game_logs()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/fg_milb_batter_game_logs.md)
  :

  **Scrape MiLB game logs for batters from FanGraphs**

- [`fg_milb_pitcher_game_logs()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/fg_milb_pitcher_game_logs.md)
  :

  **Scrape MiLB game logs for pitchers from FanGraphs**

- [`fg_park()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/fg_park.md)
  [`fg_park_hand()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/fg_park.md)
  :

  **Scrape Park Factors from FanGraphs**

- [`fg_pitch_leaders()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/fg_pitch_leaders.md)
  :

  **(legacy) Scrape Pitcher Leaderboards from FanGraphs**

- [`fg_pitcher_game_logs()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/fg_pitcher_game_logs.md)
  :

  **Scrape Pitcher Game Logs from FanGraphs**

- [`fg_pitcher_leaders()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/fg_pitcher_leaders.md)
  :

  **Scrape Pitcher Leaderboards from FanGraphs**

- [`fg_team_batter()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/fg_team_batter.md)
  :

  **Scrape Team Batter Leaderboards from FanGraphs**

- [`fg_team_fielder()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/fg_team_fielder.md)
  :

  **Scrape Team Fielder Leaderboards from FanGraphs**

- [`fg_team_pitcher()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/fg_team_pitcher.md)
  :

  **Scrape Team Pitcher Leaderboards from FanGraphs**

  [`chadwick_set_ld_library_path()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/chadwick_path.md)

  : Check Chadwick installation

  :

  **MLB Attendance**

  :

  **Acquire time codes for Major and Minor League games**

- [`mlb_game_content()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/mlb_game_content.md)
  :

  **Retrieve additional game content for major and minor league games**

- [`mlb_game_context_metrics()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/mlb_game_context_metrics.md)
  :

  **Acquire game context metrics for Major and Minor League games**

- [`mlb_game_endpoints`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/mlb_game_endpoints.md)
  [`game`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/mlb_game_endpoints.md)
  [`pbp`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/mlb_game_endpoints.md)
  :

  **MLB Game Endpoint Overview**

- [`mlb_game_info()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/mlb_game_info.md)
  :

  **Retrieve additional game information for major and minor league
  games**

- [`mlb_game_linescore()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/mlb_game_linescore.md)
  :

  **Retrieve game linescores for major and minor league games**

- [`mlb_game_pace()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/mlb_game_pace.md)
  :

  **Retrieve game pace metrics for major and minor league**

- [`mlb_game_pks()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/mlb_game_pks.md)
  :

  **Get MLB Game Info by Date and Level**

- [`mlb_game_status_codes()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/mlb_game_status_codes.md)
  :

  **MLB Game Status Codes**

- [`mlb_game_timecodes()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/mlb_game_timecodes.md)
  :

  **Acquire time codes for Major and Minor League games**

- [`mlb_game_types()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/mlb_game_types.md)
  :

  **MLB Game Types**

- [`mlb_game_wp()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/mlb_game_wp.md)
  :

  **Acquire win probability for Major and Minor League games**

- [`mlb_pbp()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/mlb_pbp.md)
  :

  **Acquire pitch-by-pitch data for Major and Minor League games**

- [`mlb_pbp_diff()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/mlb_pbp_diff.md)
  :

  **Acquire pitch-by-pitch data between two timecodes for Major and
  Minor League games**

- [`mlb_probables()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/mlb_probables.md)
  :

  **Retrieve probable starters for a given MLB game**

- [`mlb_batting_orders()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/mlb_batting_orders.md)
  :

  **Retrieve batting orders for a given MLB game**

- [`mlb_schedule()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/mlb_schedule.md)
  :

  **Find game_pk values for professional baseball games (major and minor
  leagues)**

- [`mlb_schedule_endpoints`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/mlb_schedule_endpoints.md)
  [`schedule`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/mlb_schedule_endpoints.md)
  [`game_pk`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/mlb_schedule_endpoints.md)
  :

  **MLB Schedule Endpoint Overview**

- [`mlb_schedule_event_types()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/mlb_schedule_event_types.md)
  :

  **MLB Schedule Event Types**

- [`mlb_schedule_games_tied()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/mlb_schedule_games_tied.md)
  :

  **Find game_pk values for professional baseball games (major and minor
  leagues) that are tied**

- [`mlb_schedule_postseason()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/mlb_schedule_postseason.md)
  :

  **Find game_pk values for professional baseball postseason games
  (major and minor leagues)**

- [`mlb_schedule_postseason_series()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/mlb_schedule_postseason_series.md)
  :

  **Find game_pk values for professional baseball postseason series
  games (major and minor leagues)**

- [`mlb_venues()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/mlb_venues.md)
  :

  **Find MLB Venues**

## ESPN MLB

Functions exported by baseballr to access ESPN’s Major League Baseball
endpoints (scoreboard, schedule, game summary / play-by-play, box
scores, teams, rosters, standings, athletes, leaders, draft, and
reference data).

### ESPN MLB Data Functions

Functions exported by baseballr to access ESPN’s Major League Baseball
endpoints (scoreboard, schedule, game summary / play-by-play, box
scores, teams, rosters, standings, athletes, leaders, draft, and
reference data).

- [`espn_mlb`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/espn_mlb.md)
  :

  **ESPN MLB Endpoint Overview**

- [`espn_mlb_athletes_index()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/espn_mlb_athletes_index.md)

## ESPN College Baseball

Functions exported by baseballr to access ESPN’s NCAA college baseball
endpoints (scoreboard, schedule, game summary / play-by-play, box
scores, teams, rosters, standings, athletes, leaders, conferences,
rankings, and reference data). Thin twins of the ESPN MLB family over
the same league-parameterized helpers.

### ESPN College Baseball Data Functions

Functions exported by baseballr to access ESPN’s NCAA college baseball
endpoints (scoreboard, schedule, game summary / play-by-play, box
scores, teams, rosters, standings, athletes, leaders, conferences,
rankings, and reference data). Thin twins of the ESPN MLB family over
the same league-parameterized helpers.

- [`espn_college_baseball_athletes_index()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/espn_college_baseball_athletes_index.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN College Baseball Athletes Index**

- [`espn_college_baseball_calendar()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/espn_college_baseball_calendar.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN College Baseball Calendar**

- [`espn_college_baseball_coach()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/espn_college_baseball_coach.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN College Baseball Single-Coach Detail**

- [`espn_college_baseball_coach_record()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/espn_college_baseball_coach_record.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN College Baseball Coach Career Record (Long Format)**

- [`espn_college_baseball_coach_season()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/espn_college_baseball_coach_season.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN College Baseball Coach-in-Season Detail**

- [`espn_college_baseball_coaches()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/espn_college_baseball_coaches.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN College Baseball Coaches**

- [`espn_college_baseball_conferences()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/espn_college_baseball_conferences.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN College Baseball Conferences**

- [`espn_college_baseball_game_all()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/espn_college_baseball_game_all.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN College Baseball Game All**

- [`espn_college_baseball_game_broadcasts()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/espn_college_baseball_game_broadcasts.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN College Baseball Event Broadcasts**

- [`espn_college_baseball_game_official_detail()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/espn_college_baseball_game_official_detail.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN College Baseball Event Official Detail (Single Official)**

- [`espn_college_baseball_game_officials()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/espn_college_baseball_game_officials.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN College Baseball Event Officials**

- [`espn_college_baseball_game_play()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/espn_college_baseball_game_play.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN College Baseball Event Play Detail (Single Play)**

- [`espn_college_baseball_game_play_personnel()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/espn_college_baseball_game_play_personnel.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN College Baseball Event Play Personnel (On-Court Lineup at
  Play)**

- [`espn_college_baseball_game_player_box()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/espn_college_baseball_game_player_box.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN College Baseball Event Player Box Score (Long Format)**

- [`espn_college_baseball_game_rosters()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/espn_college_baseball_game_rosters.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN College Baseball Game Rosters**

- [`espn_college_baseball_game_situation()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/espn_college_baseball_game_situation.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN College Baseball Event Situation (Live)**

- [`espn_college_baseball_game_team_leaders()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/espn_college_baseball_game_team_leaders.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN College Baseball Event Competitor Leaders (Top
  Performers)**

- [`espn_college_baseball_game_team_linescores()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/espn_college_baseball_game_team_linescores.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN College Baseball Event Competitor Linescores (Per-Inning)**

- [`espn_college_baseball_game_team_records()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/espn_college_baseball_game_team_records.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN College Baseball Event Competitor Records (At-Game
  Breakdown)**

- [`espn_college_baseball_game_team_roster()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/espn_college_baseball_game_team_roster.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN College Baseball Event Competitor Roster (Game-Day)**

- [`espn_college_baseball_game_team_roster_entry()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/espn_college_baseball_game_team_roster_entry.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN College Baseball Event Competitor Roster Entry (Per-Athlete
  Game-Day Row)**

- [`espn_college_baseball_game_team_score()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/espn_college_baseball_game_team_score.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN College Baseball Event Competitor Score (Single Row)**

- [`espn_college_baseball_game_team_statistics()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/espn_college_baseball_game_team_statistics.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN College Baseball Event Competitor Team Statistics (Long
  Format)**

- [`espn_college_baseball_leaders()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/espn_college_baseball_leaders.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN College Baseball League Leaders**

## Metrics

Functions exported by baseballr to calculate metrics

### Metrics Functions

Functions exported by baseballr to calculate metrics

- [`metrics`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/metrics.md)
  :

  **Metrics Functions Overview**

- [`woba_plus()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/woba_plus.md)
  :

  **Calculate wOBA and related metrics for any set of data**

- [`fip_plus()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/fip_plus.md)
  :

  **Calculate FIP and related metrics for any set of data**

- [`team_consistency()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/team_consistency.md)
  :

  **Calculate Team-level Consistency**

- [`run_expectancy_code()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/run_expectancy_code.md)
  :

  **Generate run expectancy and related measures from Baseball Savant
  data**

## Visualizations

Functions exported by baseballr to create visuals

### Visualizations Functions

Functions exported by baseballr to create visuals

- [`ggspraychart()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/ggspraychart.md)
  :

  **Generate spray charts with ggplot2**

## Included Data

Data exported by baseballr for ease of use

### Included baseballr data

Data exported by baseballr for ease of use

- [`column_structure_draft_mlb`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/column_structure_draft_mlb.md)
  :

  **Column structure of the MLB Draft data**

- [`teams_lu_table`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/teams_lu_table.md)
  :

  **A Team Lookup Table**

- [`stats_api_live_empty_df`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/stats_api_live_empty_df.md)
  :

  **Column structure of MLB Stats Live Game API data frame**

- [`statcast_impute`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/statcast_impute.md)
  :

  **Statcast Label Imputation**

## Utilities

### Internal utilities of baseballr

- [`most_recent_mlb_season()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/most_recent_mlb_season.md)
  :

  **Most Recent MLB Season**

- [`most_recent_ncaa_baseball_season()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/most_recent_ncaa_baseball_season.md)
  :

  **Most Recent NCAA Baseball Season**

- [`csv_from_url()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/csv_from_url.md)
  :

  **Load .csv / .csv.gz file from a remote connection**

- [`rds_from_url()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/rds_from_url.md)
  :

  **Load .rds file from a remote connection**

- [`progressively()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/progressively.md)
  :

  **Progressively**

- [`request_with_proxy()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/request_with_proxy.md)
  :

  **Retry an http request (with optional proxy) and rate-limit**

## Legacy

Functions superseded by new naming convention

### Legacy Functions

Functions superseded by new naming convention

- [`batter_game_logs_fg()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/batter_game_logs_fg.md)
  :

  **(legacy) Scrape Batter Game Logs from FanGraphs**

- [`daily_batter_bref()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/daily_batter_bref.md)
  :

  **(legacy) Scrape Batter Performance Data Over a Custom Time Frame**

- [`daily_pitcher_bref()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/daily_pitcher_bref.md)
  :

  **(legacy) Scrape Pitcher Performance Data Over a Custom Time Frame**

- [`fg_bat_leaders()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/fg_bat_leaders.md)
  :

  **(legacy) Scrape Batter Leaderboards from FanGraphs**

- [`fg_pitch_leaders()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/fg_pitch_leaders.md)
  :

  **(legacy) Scrape Pitcher Leaderboards from FanGraphs**

- [`get_batting_orders()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/get_batting_orders.md)
  :

  **(legacy) Retrieve batting orders for a given MLB game**

- [`get_draft_mlb()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/get_draft_mlb.md)
  :

  **(legacy) Retrieve draft pick information by year**

- [`get_game_info_mlb()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/get_game_info_mlb.md)
  :

  **(legacy) Retrieve additional game information for major and minor
  league games**

- [`get_game_info_sup_petti()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/get_game_info_sup_petti.md)
  :

  **(legacy) Download a data frame of supplemental data about MLB games
  since 2008.**

- [`get_game_pks_mlb()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/get_game_pks_mlb.md)
  :

  **(legacy) Get MLB Game Info by Date and Level**

- [`get_ncaa_baseball_pbp()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/get_ncaa_baseball_pbp.md)
  [`ncaa_baseball_pbp()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/get_ncaa_baseball_pbp.md)
  :

  **(legacy) Get Play-By-Play Data for NCAA Baseball Games**

- [`ncaa_baseball_roster()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/get_ncaa_baseball_roster.md)
  [`get_ncaa_baseball_roster()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/get_ncaa_baseball_roster.md)
  :

  **(legacy) Get NCAA Baseball Rosters**

- [`get_ncaa_game_logs()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/get_ncaa_game_logs.md)
  :

  **(legacy) Get NCAA Baseball Game Logs**

- [`get_ncaa_lineups()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/get_ncaa_lineups.md)
  :

  **(legacy) Retrieve lineups for a given NCAA game via its
  `game_info_url`**

- [`get_ncaa_park_factor()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/get_ncaa_park_factor.md)
  :

  **(legacy) Get Park Effects for NCAA Baseball Teams**

- [`get_ncaa_schedule_info()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/get_ncaa_schedule_info.md)
  :

  **(legacy) Get Schedule and Results for NCAA Baseball Teams**

- [`get_pbp_mlb()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/get_pbp_mlb.md)
  :

  **(legacy) Acquire pitch-by-pitch data for Major and Minor League
  games**

- [`get_probables_mlb()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/get_probables_mlb.md)
  :

  **(legacy) Retrieve probable starters for a given MLB game**

- [`get_retrosheet_data()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/get_retrosheet_data.md)
  :

  **(legacy) Get, Parse, and Format Retrosheet Event and Roster Files**

- [`get_umpire_ids_petti()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/get_umpire_ids_petti.md)
  :

  **(legacy) Download a data frame of all umpires and their MLBAM IDs
  for games since 2008**

- [`milb_batter_game_logs_fg()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/milb_batter_game_logs_fg.md)
  :

  **(legacy) Scrape MiLB game logs for batters from FanGraphs**

- [`milb_pitcher_game_logs_fg()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/milb_pitcher_game_logs_fg.md)
  :

  **(legacy) Scrape MiLB game logs for pitchers from FanGraphs**

- [`ncaa_scrape()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/ncaa_scrape.md)
  :

  **(legacy) Scrape NCAA baseball Team Player Stats (Division I, II, and
  III)**

- [`pitcher_game_logs_fg()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/pitcher_game_logs_fg.md)
  :

  **(legacy) Scrape Pitcher Game Logs from FanGraphs**

- [`school_id_lu()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/school_id_lu.md)
  :

  **(legacy) Lookup NCAA baseball school IDs (Division I, II, and III)**

- [`scrape_savant_leaderboards()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/scrape_savant_leaderboards.md)
  :

  **(legacy) Query Baseball Savant Leaderboards**

- [`scrape_statcast_savant()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/scrape_statcast_savant.md)
  [`scrape_statcast_savant.Date()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/scrape_statcast_savant.md)
  [`scrape_statcast_savant.default()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/scrape_statcast_savant.md)
  [`scrape_statcast_savant_batter()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/scrape_statcast_savant.md)
  [`scrape_statcast_savant_batter_all()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/scrape_statcast_savant.md)
  [`scrape_statcast_savant_pitcher()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/scrape_statcast_savant.md)
  [`scrape_statcast_savant_pitcher_all()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/scrape_statcast_savant.md)
  :

  **(legacy) Query Statcast by Date Range and Players**

- [`standings_on_date_bref()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/standings_on_date_bref.md)
  :

  **(legacy) Scrape MLB Standings on a Given Date**

- [`team_results_bref()`](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/reference/team_results_bref.md)
  :

  **(legacy) Scrape Team Results**

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [Getting Started with
  baseballr](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/articles/baseballr.md):

  Getting started with using `baseballr` and men’s baseball data.

- [NCAA
  Scraping](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/articles/ncaa_scraping.md):

- [Plotting Statcast
  data](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/articles/plotting_statcast.md):

- [Using Statcast Pitch
  Data](https://billpetti.github.io/baseballr/articles/using_statcast_pitch_data.md):
